race.comment: MISS ADRIFT (8) has been saved to this and third-up can find her best. Resumed here in solid order and wasn't too far away at Eagle Farm following. Has the blinkers on for the first time and steps out to 1400m for the first time. has plenty of scope for improvement and her slow track form is good. GRATIFICATION (10) is a former Victorian who settled back here first-up raced wide throughout. He has more to give and Thompson sticks aboard. No surprise if he pushes forward today and he rates a winning chance. Tougher sorting the rest. INQUICKTIME (13) mixes the form but he's capable on his day and gets in well with the 2kg claim. In good hands and can show more. TE ELCEE (11) is a likely improver from the Currie yard. May need more time but has some gear changes and deserves some consideration.
